title: More Bed Variants
description: All Beds for every kind of wood (incl. improved Bed Block Rendering)
body:
[![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/requires/quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Bed-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku-top.svg) ## More Bed Variants How could one sleep comfily without a bed made out of wood fitting the planks around the bed? No more of that. All 16 possible bed colours are now also each available in every wood type on top of the usual Oak. On top of that there are two more variants of the Bamboo Bed inspired by the _Bamboo Raft_ and the _Bamboo Block_ and its _Stripped variant_ respectively. (Thanks to [Redupro](https://modrinth.com/user/Redupro) for the idea and initial design.) With version **2.0.0**+ _More Bed Variants_ (incl. vanilla beds) uses regular _Block Rendering_ instead of _Block Entity Rendering_ enhancing performance and allowing for custom models added by resourcepacks. Two resourcepacks are already built-in to the mod as can be seen below:
**More _Pillowed_ Bed Variants** and its **_connected_** variant. ![Presentation of beds on a bed of planks - side-by-side different included resource packs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Bed-Variants/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) ### Adding 208 new beds to Minecraft.
How can I craft vanilla Beds using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Bed crafting recipes have to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipes, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft beds and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:pnku@pnku.de)!
--- ## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement: ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/kd7rj.webp) Looking out from a window of a small Savanna Village house onto the entrance of the Weaponsmith: We can see that instead of an _Oak (Red) Bed_ and an _Oak Crafting Table_ in the house and an _Oak Torch_ and a _Dark Oak Grindstone_ at the Weaponsmith's, the game now generates the village with an _**Acacia (Red) Bed**_, an _**Acacia Crafting Table**_ (from [More Crafting Tables (MCT)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafting-tables-lieonlion)), an _**Acacia Torch**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)) and an _**Acacia Grindstone**_ (from [More Grindstone Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-grindstone-variants)). ![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku-bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/jhaqa.gif)**]()
